title: The Created Pack
description: Build intricate, beautiful factories. Create houses, cars, airships, and towns... But above all, Never Forget the Gear.
body:
## ⚙ About the The Created Pack: Never Forget the Gear 🔧
The Created Pack is a dedicated Create modpack designed to elevate your gameplay through meticulously crafted recipe changes.

## ⚙ Getting Started 🔧
First, dive into the caves to gather essential ores like iron, zinc, and redstone, along with plenty of andesite! 

From there, craft your first Andesite Alloy, assemble a Hand Crank and a Mechanical Press, and flatten iron into sheets. Use those sheets to build your first Mixer and Basin. 
Once your setup is ready, you can finally mix andesite and iron ingots together to mass-produce Andesite Alloy at peak efficiency!

After that, use JEI as your guide to discover new recipes. Build a dedicated factory to automate ingredients at the lowest cost, and then leverage those outputs to chain into your next, even greater factory!

...Keep weaving your logistics together, and before you know it, a complex, breathtakingly beautiful industrial empire will stand before you.

## ⚙ Why did I create this modpack? 🔧
Create is one of my absolute favorite mods because of the complex and breathtakingly beautiful factories you can build. However, in actual gameplay, I found that the incentive to build those factories was often missing, leaving the experience feeling a bit hollow. For instance, rushing a Steam Engine early on instantly obsoletes waterwheels and windmills. Even when you want to design a dedicated assembly line for a specific item, that voice in your head says, "I can just craft this manually..."—and as a result, you end up not building a factory at all.

Intrigued and challenged by this paradox, I decided to create this modpack to fix it.
